title: January 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 13''' is the 13th day of the year. 352 days (353 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1931|1931]] – [[Chris Wiggins]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Mike Edmonds]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[L'ain Freefall]] is born.
*[[1999]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 3|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 3]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Star Wars Insider 73|''Star Wars Insider'' 73]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 8: Destroyer|''Star Wars Knights of the Old Republic: Destroyer'' trade paperback]] published.
*2010 – [[Star Wars Omnibus: Shadows of the Empire|''Omnibus: Shadows of the Empire'']] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.16|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' Comic 6.16]] published.
*[[2012]] – "[[A Friend in Need]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2019]] – "[[Bibo (episode)|Bibo]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2021]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 9|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 9]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[The Mandalorian: The Manga, Vol. 3]]'' published in the United States.
<noinclude>
